title: Motherwell rediscover mojo to have say in title race
summary: Motherwell's recent form has improved significantly, with their victory over Rangers positioning them as contenders in the title race. Rangers now face a crucial away match against Hearts, where failure to win would effectively end their title hopes under manager Danny Rohl.
content: Defeat by Motherwell means Rangers' next game away to Hearts is win or bust for Danny Rohl's side, writes Kheredine Idessane.

zh.title: 莫瑟韦尔重振雄风在争冠竞争中占有一席之地
zh.summary: 莫瑟韦尔的近期表现显著改善，他们对兰杰斯的胜利使他们成为争冠竞争的有力竞争者。兰杰斯现在面临对阵哈茨的关键客场比赛，如果无法赢得这场比赛，将实际上结束他们在主教练丹尼·罗尔领导下的争冠希望。

title: How lack of goalline technology denied Kerr hat-trick
summary: Sam Kerr's legitimate goal was incorrectly disallowed in a Women's Super League match due to the absence of goal-line technology, denying her a hat-trick. BBC pundits highlight this officiating failure and its impact on the match outcome.
content: Women's Football Show pundits Gilly Flaherty and Nia Jones look at Sam Kerr's legitimate goal that wasn't given due to a lack of goalline technology in the WSL.

zh.title: 门线技术的缺失如何导致克尔帽子戏法失效
zh.summary: 在女超联赛的一场比赛中，萨姆·克尔的合法进球因缺乏门线技术而被错误地吹掉，导致她无法完成帽子戏法。英国广播公司的评论员强调了这一裁判失误及其对比赛结果的影响。

title: Could a Premier League club lose their European place once again?
summary: Following Crystal Palace's loss of European qualification last season due to dual ownership violations, the article explores whether another Premier League club faces similar risk. This raises concerns about the consistency of Premier League ownership rule enforcement.
content: After Crystal Palace's issues last season, could a Premier League club lose their European place once again because of dual ownership issues?

zh.title: 英超俱乐部会再次因双重所有权问题失去欧洲赛事席位吗？
zh.summary: 继水晶宫上赛季因双重所有权违规失去欧洲资格后，这篇文章探讨了另一支英超俱乐部是否面临类似风险。这引发了人们对英超所有权规则执行一致性的担忧。

title: How many points do you need to stay in the Premier League?
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team analyzes the typical points threshold required for Premier League survival. The analysis provides insight into the minimum point totals historically needed to avoid relegation.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team looks into the number of points needed to avoid relegation from the Premier League

zh.title: 在英超联赛中保级需要多少分？
zh.summary: BBC体育问答团队分析了英超联赛保级所需的典型积分阈值。该分析深入探讨了历史上避免降级所需的最少积分数。

title: Who has qualified for next season's Champions League?
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team identifies which teams have already secured Champions League qualification for the 2026-27 season. The update provides clarity on European competition spots with the season still ongoing.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains which teams have already qualified for the 2026-27 edition of the Champions League.

zh.title: 谁已经获得下赛季欧冠资格？
zh.summary: BBC体育问答团队确定了哪些球队已经确保了2026-27赛季的欧冠资格。该更新在赛季仍在进行中时澄清了欧洲杯赛名额。

title: Quiz: Can you name every FA Cup finalist since 2010?
summary: This interactive quiz challenges football fans to identify all FA Cup finalists from 2010 through the present. It tests knowledge across a decade of finals featuring both tournament underdogs and serial winners.
content: From the underdogs to the serial winners, can you name every FA Cup finalist since 2010?

zh.title: 测验：你能说出2010年以来所有足总杯决赛队伍吗？
zh.summary: 这个互动测验挑战足球迷从2010年至今识别所有足总杯决赛队伍。它考察了十年决赛的知识，包括赛事黑马和常规赢家。

title: Watch: League 1 title race heats up & East Kilbride near promotion
summary: A video highlights package showcases the weekend's action from Scottish football's top divisions. East Kilbride approaches promotion while the League 1 title race intensifies among competing teams.
content: Watch the best of the action from the weekend's action in the Scottish Championship, League 1 and League 2.

zh.title: 观看：第1联赛争冠战激烈升温 及 东基尔布莱德接近升级
zh.summary: 一段视频集锦展示了苏格兰足球顶级联赛周末的精彩表现。东基尔布莱德接近升级，而第1联赛的争冠战在竞争队伍中不断升温。

title: Podcast: Derby drama & defeat for Rangers - it's the SPFL debrief.
summary: The SPFL podcast analyzes key developments including Hearts' victory over nine-man Hibernian and Rangers' defeat to Motherwell. The episode also examines which Scottish teams are currently in playoff danger.
content: Hearts beat nine-man Hibs, Rangers lose to Motherwell and who is in play-off danger?

zh.title: 播客：德比戏剧与流浪者队落败 - 苏超联赛评述
zh.summary: 苏超联赛播客分析了关键发展，包括哈茨队击败9人制希伯尼安队的胜利以及流浪者队对阵莫瑟韦尔队的失利。该节目还探讨了哪些苏格兰队目前面临附加赛风险。

title: World Cup 2026 injury watch: Key names racing to be ready
summary: Lamine Yamal was ruled out of the rest of his club season, and BBC Sport examines other key players racing to be fit for World Cup 2026 alongside those who will miss out through injury. These developments could significantly impact national team preparations for the tournament.
content: After Spain's Lamine Yamal was ruled out of the rest of his club season, BBC Sport looks at other key names racing to be fit for the World Cup - and those who are set to miss out through injury.

zh.title: 2026世界杯伤员观察：关键球员争分夺秒备战
zh.summary: 拉米内·亚马尔被禁赛至本赛季结束，BBC体育报道了其他为2026世界杯争分夺秒做准备的关键球员，以及那些将因伤缺席的球员。这些发展可能对国家队的世界杯准备产生重大影响。

title: Simons to miss rest of season and World Cup
summary: Netherlands attacking midfielder Xavi Simons has been ruled out for the rest of the season at Tottenham and will miss the World Cup due to a knee injury. Simons expressed his heartbreak over missing both the club season and the summer tournament.
content: Netherlands attacking midfielder Xavi Simons says he is "heartbroken" after being ruled out for the rest of the season for relegation-battling Tottenham and this summer's World Cup because of a knee injury.

zh.title: 西蒙斯将缺席赛季剩余比赛和世界杯
zh.summary: 荷兰进攻型中场哈维·西蒙斯因膝伤被宣布本赛季报销，将无法参加世界杯。西蒙斯对错过俱乐部赛季和夏季赛事表示心碎。

title: Goodwin expects transfer interest in Ferry - gossip
summary: Dundee United manager Goodwin expects transfer interest in left-back Ferry. Additional gossip includes Rangers discussing a penalty incident and John McGinn being on Everton's radar.
content: Dundee United boss expects interest in left-back, Rangers head coach cites penalty incident and John McGinn on Everton's radar.

zh.title: 古德温预计费里将吸引转会关注 - 绯闻
zh.summary: 邓迪联队主教练古德温预计左后卫费里将吸引转会关注。其他绯闻包括流浪者队讨论一个点球事件，以及约翰·麦吉恩进入埃弗顿的视野。

title: Making history and facing Neymar - Lingard on life in Brazil
summary: Jesse Lingard discusses his new life after moving to Corinthians in his first major interview since joining a Brazilian club. The piece covers his adjustment to Brazil and reflections on Manchester United.
content: In his first major interview since moving to Brazil, Jesse Lingard talks to the BBC about his new life, and Manchester United.

zh.title: 创造历史并面对内马尔 - 林加德谈巴西生活
zh.summary: 杰西·林加德讨论了他加入巴西俱乐部科林蒂安人队后的新生活，这是他加入巴西球队以来的第一次重要采访。文章涵盖了他对巴西的适应以及对曼彻斯特联队的思考。

title: Lingard on playing in Brazil and Man Utd
summary: Jesse Lingard talks about his move to Corinthians and argues that Michael Carrick should become Manchester United's manager. The interview explores his perspectives on his former club's direction.
content: Jesse Lingard talks about moving to Corinthians, and discusses why Michael Carrick should get the Manchester United manager's job.

zh.title: 林加德谈在巴西踢球和曼联
zh.summary: 杰西·林加德谈论了他转会到科林蒂安人队，并主张迈克尔·卡里克应该成为曼彻斯特联队的主教练。采访探讨了他对前俱乐部发展方向的看法。

title: Pulisic goalless streak hits 16, tying career worst
summary: Christian Pulisic extended his goalless streak to 16 games, matching his career worst, after AC Milan's 0-0 draw with Juventus. The poor form raises concerns about the American winger's current condition.
content: Christian Pulisic equaled his worst goalless streak after he was unable to find the back of the net in AC Milan's 0-0 draw with Juventus on Sunday.

zh.title: 普利西克进球荒达16场，平职业生涯最差纪录
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·普利西克的进球荒延长至16场，与其职业生涯最差纪录持平，这发生在AC米兰与尤文图斯0-0战平之后。这种糟糕状态引发了对这位美国边锋目前状况的担忧。

title: Wrexham lose to Coventry, cling to playoff places
summary: Wrexham suffered a 3-1 defeat to Coventry City, placing their Championship playoff hopes in jeopardy. The loss came during Coventry's title celebration week.
content: Coventry celebrated their Sky Bet Championship title party with a 3-1 victory that leaves Wrexham's playoff ambitions in the balance.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆负科文垂，季后赛席位岌岌可危
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆以3-1不敌科文垂城，使其英超联赛季后赛希望陷入危险。这场失利发生在科文垂庆祝夺冠期间。

title: American Albert, 16, tops Reyna Bundesliga mark
summary: Mathis Albert became the youngest American to debut in the Bundesliga at age 16 years, 11 months, and 5 days playing for Borussia Dortmund. He surpassed the previous American record set by Gio Reyna.
content: Mathis Albert became the youngest American to play in the Bundesliga when he made his debut for Borussia Dortmund on Sunday at the age of 16 years, 11 months and 5 days.

zh.title: 16岁美国人阿尔伯特创德甲美国最年轻纪录，超越雷纳
zh.summary: 马西斯·阿尔伯特以16岁11个月零5天的年纪为多特蒙德效力，成为德甲最年轻的美国首秀球员，打破了吉奥·雷纳之前保持的美国纪录。

title: Chelsea interim boss relieved after FA Cup win
summary: Interim Chelsea coach Calum McFarlane expressed relief after guiding the club to an FA Cup final with a 1-0 semifinal win over Leeds. He took over just three days after Liam Rosenior's dismissal.
content: Chelsea interim coach Calum McFarlane said he felt "relief" after guiding the club to the FA Cup final days with a 1-0 semifinal win against Leeds United, three days after replacing Liam Rosenior following his dismissal after just 106 days in charge.

zh.title: 切尔西临时主帅在足总杯胜利后如释重负
zh.summary: 切尔西临时主教练卡勒姆·麦克法兰在1-0击败利兹联的半决赛中带领球队进入足总杯决赛后表示欣慰。他是在利亚姆·罗森尼奥被撤销后的三天内接手的。

title: Goalkeepers sent off after brawl in Spain's 2nd tier
summary: A Spanish second-division match between Zaragoza and Huesca ended in violence when goalkeeper Esteban Andrada punched defender Jorge Pulido in the face. Andrada received a red card for the incident.
content: A second-division soccer game in Spain ended in a brawl Sunday after Zaragoza goalkeeper Esteban Andrada punched Huesca defender Jorge Pulido in the face.

zh.title: 西班牙第二级别联赛门将因斗殴被罚下
zh.summary: 萨拉戈萨和韦斯卡之间的西班牙第二级别联赛比赛以暴力事件结束，门将埃斯特班·安德拉达用拳头打了后卫豪尔赫·普利多的脸。安德拉达因此事件被罚红牌。

title: FIFA to raise WC prize money amid cost concerns
summary: FIFA plans to increase World Cup prize money following complaints from national associations about rising operational costs at tournaments. The adjustment addresses financial concerns from participating nations.
content: World Cup prize money is set to be increased after concerns were raised by some national associations over high operational costs at the tournament.

zh.title: 国际足联因成本担忧上调世界杯奖金
zh.summary: 国际足联计划在国家协会对赛事运营成本上升的投诉后增加世界杯奖金。该调整解决了参赛国的财务顾虑。

title: Pep gives City license for 'quality time' on break
summary: Pep Guardiola granted Manchester City's players permission to travel and enjoy downtime before the team's final push for trophies. The treble-chasing squad can take a brief break before the crucial period.
content: Pep Guardiola has given his treble-chasing players permission to jet off around the world before Manchester City's final push.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉给曼城球员放假享受'高质量休息时间'
zh.summary: 瓜迪奥拉批准曼城球员在球队最后冲刺阶段前可以旅游并享受休闲时光。这支追求三冠王的球队可以在关键时期前休息片刻。

title: Vegan Forest Green deny fan bacon sandwich beef
summary: Forest Green Rovers denied allegations that a rival fan was ejected for eating a bacon sandwich at their stadium. The vegan club addressed questions about their conduct policies.
content: Forest Green Rovers deny rival fan being kicked out for eating a bacon sandwich

zh.title: 素食俱乐部森林绿队否认赶出吃培根三明治球迷的指控
zh.summary: 森林绿队否认了一名对方球迷因在他们的球场上吃培根三明治而被赶出的指控。这家素食俱乐部对其行为政策问题进行了说明。
